summary: BANK SADERAT PLC (LEI: 2138008KTNTDICZU8L25; GB Companies House: 01126618) is identifier-confirmed and registered in the United Kingdom. Bank Saderat Iran holds 75% or more of shares and voting rights and retains the right to appoint or remove directors, making it both the direct and ultimate parent under accounting consolidation; Mr Mohsen Seifi Kafshgari (appointed director 2024-10-19) additionally holds significant influence or control, while HAMID BORHANI and ROBERT JOHN SPEEDY serve as directors and DOMINIC NICHOLAS holds a senior managing official role from 2023-12-29. Multiple high-confidence risk signals are present: BANK SADERAT PLC itself is tagged as sanctioned by OpenSanctions; its parent Bank Saderat Iran is independently flagged as sanctioned (and sanction-linked) by OpenSanctions across several records; and Mr Mohsen Seifi Kafshgari is flagged as sanction-linked by OpenSanctions at both high and medium confidence. The ownership chain reaches into Iran, a jurisdiction on the FATF High-Risk (Call for Action / black list) list as of February 2026, corroborated by both GLEIF and UK Companies House at high confidence. A licensing limitation applies: OpenSanctions data is published under CC-BY-NC-4.0, and commercial re-use of that data is not permitted under the source licence.
